title: NA THU MAAN NA LIAN HI

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Na thumaanna lian hi Na thumaanna lian hi
Zingsang simin hehpihna thak ka mu
teng Na khut in hong guan tawntung
Na thumaanna lian hi Topa kei tung.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Ni kha le aksite ngeina bang ciat in
Khuakhal le tuk hunte phalbi ni pi
Na thumaan hehpih itna hong lak hi

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Mawhna maisakna le a kip lungnopna
Nong ompih lungdamna lam nong hilhna
A pha tampite zong Nangma thupha
